description.ko: 생물 발광의 경이로움과 고대 해양의 신비 속에 빛의 이정표로 서 있는 AQUA-5 기지와 함께 암흑 구역의 압도적인 심해로 내려가 보세요.
description.en: Descend into the crushing depths of the midnight zone where the AQUA-5 station stands as a beacon of light amidst bioluminescent wonders and ancient marine mysteries.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a futuristic underwater research station AQUA-5 nestled in a deep-sea trench, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, schools of translucent fish, hydrothermal vents emitting ethereal smoke, dark abyssal background with neon blue and teal highlights, ultra-realistic, 8k resolution, high contrast.
